name: Pioneer Racing
short_description: Competitive racing game focused on performance and lap times. Race against bots, upgrade your cars, beat your best times, and unlock faster vehicles across 12 circuit configurations. Skill-based progression.
detailed_description:
Pioneer Racing is a competitive racing game focused on performance, upgrades, and chronos.

Start with an entry-level car and prove your skill on the track. Race against Bots, push your limits, and unlock faster, more advanced vehicles. Every lap matters: your best times are saved, challenging you to improve with every run.

Between races, freely explore the circuits or fine-tune your car. Adjust performance parameters, customize visuals, and optimize your setup to be even better at each new race. Speed is earned, not given.

The game currently features:

  • 3 maps with 4 presets each (day, night, rain, night rain): 12 race configurations

  • 5 fully detailed cars, including interior views

  • Advanced performance customization

  • Full controller support

  • Minimap and dynamic racing UI

  • Multiple camera views, including cockpit and rotating around the car

  • Free driving after races

Pioneer Racing is in active development. Planned features include:

  • Multiplayer (race against others)

  • New, more detailed circuits

  • New cars built with high attention to detail

  • UI sounds (button clicks)

  • Improved controls and accessibility

  • new best chronos menu and system

  • Continuous bug fixes and optimizations

Development is handled by me alone, with a focus on quality and long-term evolution. Updates might be delayed until the new functionalities are important enough. You can expect an update every two months, more or less.

Community feedback directly influences development. Suggestions are welcome via the YouTube channel and community spaces. Your ideas shape the game into a better, more fun racing experience.

Race. Improve. Repeat.
